description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden template .v133_base with environment name gkevc_133/$REVIEW_REF_PREFIX$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA, URL https://gitlab${DOMAIN}, and variables DOMAIN, HOST_SUFFIX, VARIABLES_FILE, VCLUSTER_K8S_VERSION, VCLUSTER_NAME, extending .vcluster_base. Add a create_review_v133 job in the review stage that extends .v133_base, uses the ${BUSYBOX_IMAGE} Docker image, sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, starts an environment with action start, auto_stop_in $REVIEW_APPS_AUTO_STOP_IN, on_stop stop_review_v133, and runs the script echo "Configuring gkevc_133/$REVIEW_REF_PREFIX$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA to automatically stop in $REVIEW_APPS_AUTO_STOP_IN.". Include the GitLab component gitlab.com/gitlab-org/quality/pipeline-common/allure-report@9.6.3 to add an e2e-test-v133 job named e2e-test-v133 in the qa-report stage, passing allure_results_glob, AWS and GitLab token variable names, and configure it to run only when CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE is pipeline or parent_pipeline and never on gitlab.com. Define qa_v133 job that extends .qa_branch and .v133_base, runs in the qa stage, needs review_v133 and review_specs_v133 (without artifacts), and sets TEST_SUITE to $QA_SANITY_SUITE_OPTIONS. Add a qa_v133_full_suite_manual_trigger job that echoes a message about triggering the full E2E suite, and a qa_v133_manual_full_suite job that extends .qa_branch and .v133_base, depends on the manual trigger, runs with parallel:7, and sets TEST_SUITE to $QA_FULL_SUITE_OPTIONS. Create review_specs_v133, review_v133, and stop_review_v133 jobs that extend their respective vcluster templates, inherit the .v133_base environment, and respectively provide access, access, and stop actions, with stop_review_v133 set as the on_stop target for create_review_v133.
